description: Advanced conic section properties including co-vertices, directrices, eccentricity, and latus rectum extraction from ellipses, parabolas, and hyperbolas.
utility: Extract eccentricity, directrix, co-vertex, and latus rectum from conic sections

arguments.name: conic
arguments.description: Conic section variable to extract property from

arguments.name: propertyType
arguments.type: covertex, n | directrix, n | eccentricity | latus_rectum
arguments.description: Property name to extract, with optional 1-based index

alternates.description: Get nth co-vertex of ellipse (n = 1 or 2)
Get nth directrix line of ellipse (n = 1 or 2)
Get the directrix line of parabola
Get nth directrix line of hyperbola (n = 1 or 2)
Get eccentricity value (0 < e < 1 for ellipse, e = 1 for parabola, e > 1 for hyperbola)

examples.scenario: Get latus rectum of an ellipse
